notes: Historical-pattern case inspired by handbook §8.3 public enforcement: kitchen small-appliance ads claiming oil/power reduction mismatched measured data (CN¥200k fine example). Maps to demo-cn-performance-data-mismatch-risk. Not HyperHeat PC201 (source file still pending). Not legal advice.

content.text: 新款空气炸锅用油量减少高达80%，耗电量降低一半，每晚只需一度电。广告
